views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Hero progress ring showing oz consumed vs daily goal, quick-add row of favorite containers, today's intake timeline, current streak badge, and motivational status message

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-add modal with container size presets that auto-fill amount, beverage type selector with hydration coefficient indicator, and optional note

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap colored by goal achievement percentage (red → yellow → green), expandable daily breakdown showing each drink with time and beverage type, and swipe-to-delete

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: 7-day bar chart of effective hydration, hourly distribution heatmap showing when user drinks most, beverage type pie chart, weekly trend comparison, and AI-style insight cards

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalOz
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of amountOz for all entries today (raw volume, not adjusted)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEffectiveOz
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of amountOz * hydrationCoefficient for each beverage type today (water=1.0, sparklingWater=1.0, tea=0.95, coffee=0.80, juice=0.85, milk=0.90, sportsDrink=1.0, other=0.9)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayEffectiveOz / dailyGoalOz clamped to 0...1 for progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayRemainingOz
viewModelComputedProperties.description: max(0, dailyGoalOz - todayEffectiveOz) — how many oz left to hit goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntryCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of drink entries logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days (ending today or yesterday) where effectiveOz >= dailyGoalOz

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Maximum streak ever achieved across all history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageOz
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily effectiveOz over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: last7DaysChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily effective oz totals for the past 7 days, with flag if goal was met, for bar chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: hourlyDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Map of hour (0-23) to total oz consumed at that hour across all history, identifies peak/low hydration windows

viewModelComputedProperties.name: beverageBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Breakdown of total intake by beverage type with percentage share, for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalAchievementRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of tracked days where effective intake met or exceeded daily goal (last 30 days)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of computed insight cards: streak milestone alerts, best hydration day of week, morning-vs-afternoon ratio, dehydration risk if intake is below 50% by 2pm, weekly improvement/decline, beverage diversity score

viewModelComputedProperties.name: timeSinceLastDrink
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Seconds since the most recent entry today, nil if no entries. Used for 'time to drink' nudge on dashboard

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Day name (Mon-Sun) with the highest average effective intake across all history

dailyGoal.description: User-configurable daily hydration goal in fluid ounces. Commonly recommended 64 oz (8 x 8oz glasses). Advanced: adjust by body weight (0.5 oz per lb) or activity level.

hydrationCoefficients.description: Multiplier applied to raw oz based on beverage type to compute effective hydration. Water and sparkling water = 1.0 (full hydration). Coffee = 0.80 (mild diuretic offset). Tea = 0.95. Juice = 0.85 (sugar content). Milk = 0.90. Sports drink = 1.0. Other = 0.90.

containerDefaults.description: Preset oz values for each container type to enable one-tap logging

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward streak if todayEffectiveOz >= dailyGoalOz. Streak is consecutive qualifying days ending today (if today qualifies) or yesterday (if today is in progress). Missing a single day resets the streak to 0.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare rolling 7-day average effective intake against the previous 7-day window. Surface percentage change as trend indicator. Also track: goal achievement rate over 30 days, hourly intake pattern shifts, and beverage type diversity (Shannon entropy across types).
insights: streak_milestone: Celebrate streaks at 3, 7, 14, 30, 60, 100 days with badge-style callout
dehydration_warning: If current time > 14:00 and todayEffectiveOz < dailyGoalOz * 0.5, surface warning card
best_day: Identify day of week with highest average intake and suggest maintaining pattern
morning_hydration: If intake before 10am is < 16oz on average, suggest front-loading hydration
weekly_improvement: If weeklyTrendPercent > 10, celebrate improvement; if < -10, encourage consistency
beverage_diversity: If > 80% of intake is single type, suggest mixing in other hydrating beverages
time_gap_alert: If timeSinceLastDrink > 3 hours during waking hours (8am-10pm), nudge to drink
goal_consistency: If goalAchievementRate > 0.9 over 30 days, suggest increasing goal by 8oz
